title.en: Building an Airbnb UI Clone with Next.js and React
title.es: Clonando la interfaz de Airbnb con Next.js y React

description.en: Build a mobile-first Airbnb UI clone in Next.js 16 using React components and a vision-to-spec workflow. Implement Home, Catalog, and Room Detail views with reusable components, client-side state, and route-based navigation.
description.es: Construye un clon mobile-first de la UI de Airbnb en Next.js 16 usando componentes de React y un flujo de vision-to-spec. Implementa las vistas Home, Catalogo y Room Detail con componentes reutilizables, estado del cliente y navegacion por rutas.

sharing.en: I just completed Building an Airbnb UI Clone with Next.js and React with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-airbnb-ui-clone #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript
sharing.es: Acabo de completar Clonando la interfaz de Airbnb con Next.js y React con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Mira el proyecto: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-airbnb-ui-clone #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript

sharing.en: Built and shipped: Building an Airbnb UI Clone with Next.js and React. Learning by building with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/nextjs-airbnb-ui-clone #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #nextjs #react #typescript
